description: IDEAconsult operates eNanoMapper and related nanosafety data services for searching and accessing nanomaterial, study, and project database information. Its public APIs expose AMBIT/eNanoMapper data and search functions across different database instances.
summary: IDEAconsult exposes two public HTTP/OpenAPI surfaces on api.ideaconsult.net: the eNanoMapper API and the NANoREG API; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
